title: ARES: Alternating Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning for Enhanced Multi-Modal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Through Diverse AI Feedback

method.name: ARES
method.description: Alternating Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning using diverse AI feedback
key_features: Uses sentence-level feedback instead of ranking-based feedback
Employs an advanced AI model as a 'Teacher' for feedback

results.main_finding: Improved rationale reasoning leads to a 2.5% increase in inference answer accuracy on average for multi-modal datasets
improvements: Enables diverse improvements beyond pretraining distribution

challenges_addressed: Ranking-based feedback limitations where valuable parts of less preferred samples are disregarded
Instability of RL process requiring extensive hyperparameter tuning
Generation of repetitive words and truncated sentences

introduction.context: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models demonstrate remarkable performance but often generate toxic and biased content
introduction.limitations: Ranking-based feedback and instability of RL process
